en: a member of a small group of people who have power and control over a country or organization, often for their own benefit
to encourage the development of something, or relating to raising a child who is not your own by birth
not sure or certain about something; possibly not good, safe, or reliable
happening or done before the usual or proper time
to suggest something unpleasant in an indirect way
an amount left over after need has been satisfied, or more than what is needed
all the people who work in a country, area, or company
to enter someone's land or property without permission
a temporary halt in an activity, especially work
the activity of having sex with someone in exchange for money
completely loyal to a person, group, or set of beliefs
the crime of driving a vehicle while affected by alcohol or drugs (short for 'driving under the influence')
a system that cools and dries the air in a room or vehicle (short for 'air conditioning')
having the same design, pattern, or color as something else
